- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Full-stack testing application created with React frontend, Node.js Express backend, and MongoDB Atlas integration.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created project structure with:
	- Frontend folder (React app)
	- Backend folder (Node.js Express server)
	- Both with complete package.json configurations

- [x] Customize the Project
	Added complete implementation:
	- React components for data form and list with CRUD operations
	- Express server with MongoDB schema and RESTful API routes
	- CSS styling with responsive design
	- Error handling and validation

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No specific extensions required for this project.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Project structure ready. Dependencies need to be installed separately in frontend and backend folders.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Instructions provided in README files for running both frontend and backend.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Backend: npm start (from backend folder)
	Frontend: npm start (from frontend folder)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md files created with comprehensive setup and usage instructions.
